languages.text: "Рабочий, идеально выполняя свою функцию, может считать, что смысл его жизни — обеспечить семью. Это решает лишь он".
"A worker who perfectly fulfils his function may believe that the meaning of life is to provide for his family. That is for him alone to decide."
languages.original_text: "Рабочий, идеально выполняя свою функцию, может считать, что смысл его жизни — обеспечить семью. Это решает лишь он".

traits.locale_text: "A worker who perfectly fulfils his function may believe that the meaning of life is to provide for his family. That is for him alone to decide."
"A worker who perfectly fulfils his function may believe that the meaning of life is to provide for his family. That is for him alone to decide."
"A worker who perfectly fulfils his function may believe that the meaning of life is to provide for his family. That is for him alone to decide."

languages.text: «Un trabajador que cumple a la perfección con su función puede creer que el sentido de la vida es alimentar a su familia. Solo él puede decidirlo».
languages.original_text: "A worker who perfectly fulfils his function may believe that the meaning of life is to provide for his family. That is for him alone to decide."

traits.locale_text: «Un trabajador que cumple a la perfección con su función puede creer que el sentido de la vida es alimentar a su familia. Solo él puede decidirlo».

languages.text: “一个尽职尽责的工人，可能会觉得生命的意义就是养家糊口。而这就是他的选择。”
languages.original_text: "A worker who perfectly fulfils his function may believe that the meaning of life is to provide for his family. That is for him alone to decide."

traits.locale_text: “一个尽职尽责的工人，可能会觉得生命的意义就是养家糊口。而这就是他的选择。”

languages.text: « Un ouvrier qui remplit parfaitement sa fonction peut estimer que le sens de la vie est de subvenir aux besoins de sa famille. C'est à lui seul d'en décider. »
languages.original_text: "A worker who perfectly fulfils his function may believe that the meaning of life is to provide for his family. That is for him alone to decide."

traits.locale_text: « Un ouvrier qui remplit parfaitement sa fonction peut estimer que le sens de la vie est de subvenir aux besoins de sa famille. C'est à lui seul d'en décider. »

languages.text: "Ein Arbeiter, der seine Funktion perfekt ausfüllt, mag glauben, der Dienst für seine Familie wäre der Sinn des Lebens. Das muss er allein entscheiden."
languages.original_text: "A worker who perfectly fulfils his function may believe that the meaning of life is to provide for his family. That is for him alone to decide."

traits.locale_text: "Ein Arbeiter, der seine Funktion perfekt ausfüllt, mag glauben, der Dienst für seine Familie wäre der Sinn des Lebens. Das muss er allein entscheiden."

languages.text: 「自分の職務を完璧に果たした労働者は、家族を養うことが人生の意義だと考えるかもしれない。それを決めるのは彼一人である。」
languages.original_text: "A worker who perfectly fulfils his function may believe that the meaning of life is to provide for his family. That is for him alone to decide."

traits.locale_text: 「自分の職務を完璧に果たした労働者は、家族を養うことが人生の意義だと考えるかもしれない。それを決めるのは彼一人である。」

languages.text: "İşlevini mükemmel bir şekilde yerine getiren bir işçi, hayatın anlamının ailesinin geçimini sağlamak olduğuna inanabilir. Buna karar vermek yalnızca kendisinin bileceği iştir."
languages.original_text: "A worker who perfectly fulfils his function may believe that the meaning of life is to provide for his family. That is for him alone to decide."

traits.locale_text: "İşlevini mükemmel bir şekilde yerine getiren bir işçi, hayatın anlamının ailesinin geçimini sağlamak olduğuna inanabilir. Buna karar vermek yalnızca kendisinin bileceği iştir."
